app.name: LunaSleep AI
app.tagline: AI + NLP + ML + IoT for calmer sleep insight

base.floating_chat_description: Ask your sleep coach about trends and next steps.

landing.hero_description: Predict sleep efficiency, get AI coaching, and monitor live sensor signals in one calm workflow.
landing.hero_copy: Predict sleep efficiency, follow overnight movement, and turn raw nightly signals into calmer, practical next steps.
landing.feature_predictor_preview_description: See how habits affect sleep efficiency.
landing.feature_monitor_preview_description: Watch movement, awakenings, and device status.
landing.feature_ai_preview_description: Turn sleep data into clear next steps.

prediction.button_copy: Structured nightly inputs turn into a guided score preview you can compare over time.
prediction.preview_title: A guided score preview for each night.
prediction.preview_copy: Preview how sleep duration, awakenings, and lifestyle signals shape efficiency so you can compare habits before and after routine changes.
prediction.note: Prediction creates a steady baseline before you compare it with real overnight movement and coaching.

monitor.button_copy: Connected telemetry keeps the night readable through movement and awakening signals.
monitor.preview_title: Movement and awakenings in real time.
monitor.preview_copy: Use connected motion telemetry to watch sensor status, movement shifts, and awakenings as the sleep session evolves.
monitor.note: The monitor adds live context so predicted sleep quality can be compared against actual overnight behavior.

coach.button_copy: The coach explains patterns and turns sleep data into next-step routine guidance.
coach.preview_title: Turn sleep data into next steps.
coach.preview_copy: Ask follow-up questions, keep a persistent sleep conversation, and turn technical sleep patterns into practical routines.
coach.note: AI coaching closes the loop by explaining what changed, why it matters, and what you should test next.
coach.chat_1: Your score improved, but the wake pattern still suggests restless sleep after midnight.
coach.chat_2: Try shifting your wind-down 30 minutes earlier and compare the next few nights.

how_it_works.step_1_copy: Add your nightly sleep and routine inputs to generate a predicted efficiency score.
how_it_works.step_2_copy: Overlay connected movement signals and awakenings to understand what happened overnight.
how_it_works.step_3_copy: Use the AI coach to translate the score and sensor context into practical next-step advice.

basics.label: Sleep Basics
basics.title: What is sleep efficiency?
basics.copy: A simple view of how much time in bed becomes actual sleep, and why that ratio matters.

quality.label: Night Quality
quality.title: Why awakenings matter
quality.copy: Frequent wake periods can reduce recovery even when total sleep duration seems acceptable.

interpretation.label: Interpretation
interpretation.title: How AI explains your sleep
interpretation.copy: LunaSleep AI turns prediction and telemetry into plain-language context you can act on.

about.label: About LunaSleep AI
about.hero_title: A sleep-focused product built around explanation, not just measurement.
about.hero_copy: LunaSleep AI brings together machine learning, natural-language guidance, and connected movement sensing to help users understand sleep efficiency in context.

prediction.label: ML Prediction
prediction.title: Structured sleep scoring
prediction.copy: The predictor estimates sleep efficiency from age, duration, stages, awakenings, caffeine, and lifestyle context.

monitor.label: IoT Monitoring
monitor.title: Live movement context
monitor.copy: The monitor keeps live sensor telemetry visible so motion, posture, and awakenings can be reviewed alongside predictions.

ai.label: AI + NLP
ai.title: Plain-language coaching
ai.copy: The AI coach explains scores, answers sleep questions, and helps translate data into realistic behavior changes.

direction.label: Product Direction
direction.for_copy: The product is designed for people who want a calmer way to understand sleep quality: a guided score, a live movement view, and an AI coach that can explain what may matter next.
direction.not_copy: LunaSleep AI does not replace clinical evaluation or diagnose medical conditions. It is built to support interpretation, reflection, and healthier nightly habits.

contact.hero_title: Request a demo or start a product conversation.
contact.hero_copy: Use this page as a simple contact point for pilots, feedback, research discussions, or product walkthroughs.

reach.title: Contact details
reach.focus_value: Sleep analytics, AI guidance, and connected monitoring workflows

items.2: Whether you want a product demo, technical review, or partnership discussion.
items.3: Any sleep data, hardware, or AI integration questions you want covered.
items.4: The best time window for a follow-up.

dashboard.next_step_3: Ask AI what affected the score

latest.label: Latest Sleep Insight
latest.next_step_copy: Compare this score with the monitor, then ask the AI coach what variable matters most.

latest_insight.low: Rest looked fragmented. Start with fewer late stimulants and a steadier wind-down.
latest_insight.medium: Your sleep is holding together, but awakenings or timing may still be pulling efficiency down.
latest_insight.good: You are in a healthy range. Small improvements in consistency can still lift recovery.
latest_insight.excellent: Your pattern looks strong. Protect the routine that is already helping you sleep well.

empty.title: No insight yet
empty.copy: Start with your first prediction to create a sleep score, then return here for the latest summary.

predictor.daily_tip_fallback: Keep tonight simple: protect a steady bedtime and give yourself a quiet wind-down window.
predictor.hero_title: Predict sleep efficiency from routines, sleep stages, and night interruptions.
predictor.hero_copy: Move through four calm steps, submit once, and review the model result without leaving the page.
predictor.step_intro: Complete this section to help LunaSleep AI interpret your sleep context more accurately.

Age.label: Age
Age.help: Your age in years. Sleep patterns often shift by age group.

Gender.label: Gender
Gender.help: Use the same 0 or 1 encoding used by the training data.

Sleep duration.label: Sleep duration
Sleep duration.help: How many hours you slept, including decimals such as 7.5.

REM sleep percentage.label: REM sleep percentage
REM sleep percentage.help: Percent of the night spent in REM sleep.

Deep sleep percentage.label: Deep sleep percentage
Deep sleep percentage.help: Percent of the night spent in deep sleep.

Light sleep percentage.label: Light sleep percentage
Light sleep percentage.help: Percent of the night spent in light sleep.

Awakenings.label: Awakenings
Awakenings.help: How many times you woke up during the night.

Caffeine consumption.label: Caffeine consumption
Caffeine consumption.help: Approximate caffeine intake before sleep, in milligrams.

Alcohol consumption.label: Alcohol consumption
Alcohol consumption.help: Number of alcoholic drinks before sleep.

Smoking status.label: Smoking status
Smoking status.help: Use 0 for no and 1 for yes.

Exercise frequency.label: Exercise frequency
Exercise frequency.help: How many exercise sessions you usually complete per week.

result.label: Prediction Result
result.low: Sleep looked fragmented. Consider reducing late stimulation and caffeine before bed.
result.medium: Sleep efficiency is moderate. A steadier bedtime and fewer awakenings may help.
result.good: Sleep efficiency is good. Small improvements in routine consistency can push this higher.
result.excellent: Sleep efficiency is excellent. Your current routine appears to support solid rest.

before_submit_items.1: Profile basics help the model interpret age, encoded gender, and sleep duration together.
before_submit_items.2: Sleep-stage percentages describe how your night was split between REM, deep, and light sleep.
before_submit_items.3: Awakenings and caffeine capture common reasons sleep becomes fragmented.
before_submit_items.4: Alcohol, smoking, and exercise add lifestyle context that can shift predicted efficiency.
before_submit_items.5: The final result appears here with a plain-English habit insight.

monitor.title: Sleep Monitor
monitor.subtitle: Live movement, posture, and awakenings.
monitor.hero_title: Real-time movement telemetry for sleep state, posture, and awakenings.
monitor.hero_copy: Monitor movement, efficiency, awakenings, and posture from the live sensor stream in one focused view.
monitor.sensor_sender_unavailable: Sensor sender unavailable; waiting for data.

status.label: Status
status.copy: Sleep state classification from the live feed.

items.1: Sleep state shows whether the current movement pattern looks awake or sleeping.
items.2: Movement tracks the latest acceleration change from the sensor stream.
items.3: Efficiency estimates the share of the session spent asleep.
items.4: Awakenings counts wake transitions during the session.
items.5: Orientation renders pitch and roll as a simple posture model.

disconnected.label: Disconnected State
disconnected.title: Waiting for sleep sensor data
disconnected.copy: The monitor is ready, but no live stream has been received yet.

steps.1: Check that the device is powered on.
steps.2: Make sure the device is on the same network.

chat.hero_title: Ask for plain-language explanations of your sleep score, habits, and next steps.
chat.hero_copy: LunaSleep AI uses your latest prediction context while still answering general questions about sleep and recovery.
chat.score_trend_empty: Run at least two predictions to see a trend.
chat.empty_state: Ask about your latest prediction, recent awakenings, caffeine timing, or general sleep questions.
chat.delete_confirm: Delete this coach session and all messages?
chat.ai_unavailable: AI assistant is unavailable right now.

no_score.2: How do I improve my score?

low.3: How do I improve my score?

medium.1: How can I push my score higher?

learn.label: Learn
learn.hero_title: Practical sleep concepts that make the data easier to understand.
learn.hero_copy: LunaSleep AI is built around interpretable sleep signals. These short guides explain the concepts behind the score, the monitor, and the AI coach.

efficiency.label: Sleep Efficiency
efficiency.title: What is sleep efficiency?
efficiency.copy: Sleep efficiency is the share of time in bed that you are actually asleep. Higher efficiency usually means less time spent awake after falling asleep and a more consolidated night.

awakenings.label: Awakenings
awakenings.title: Why awakenings matter
awakenings.copy: Frequent awakenings can fragment sleep, reduce restorative stages, and lower sleep efficiency even when total time in bed looks adequate.

caffeine.label: Caffeine
caffeine.title: How caffeine affects sleep
caffeine.copy: Caffeine can delay sleep onset, lighten sleep, and increase the chance of overnight disruption, especially when taken later in the day or in larger amounts.

movement.label: Movement
movement.title: How movement tracking helps
movement.copy: Movement patterns can provide useful signals about restlessness, awakenings, and posture shifts. They do not tell the full story alone, but they add valuable context.

ai.label: AI Guidance
ai.title: How AI can explain sleep data
ai.copy: AI can summarize trends, answer questions in plain language, and connect the score with habits like caffeine timing, bedtime consistency, or repeated awakenings.

errors.name_length: Name must be between 2 and 120 characters long.
errors.password_length: Password must be between 8 and 128 characters long.
errors.email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.check_form: Check the form fields and try again.
